Refrigerator For Sale
listings.body: The Frigidaire FRFG1723AV04 is a 17.6 cu. ft. counter-depth French door refrigerator in fingerprint-resistant stainless steel, designed for smaller spaces with a 31-inch width. Key features include CrispSeal®️ crispers, the EvenTemp™️ cooling system and a 3-tier bottom freezer. Capacity & Design: 17.6 cu. ft. total capacity with a 31.3" width and 27.6" depth (approx. 29.1" with door). 67" height with front hinges (only) at 68" height. Cooling System: Even Temp™️ maintains consistent temperatures to reduce warm spots. Storage: Includes CrispSeal®️ crispers for produce, edge-to-edge glass shelves, and adjustable gallon door bins. Freezer: 3-tier freezer storage helps organize frozen items. Additional Features: ENERGY STAR®️ certified, internal filtered water dispenser, and digital temperature controls. Performance & Reviews: It operates quietly and fits well into tight kitchen configurations.

listings.title: Premium 2026 World Cup Bracket Display - Updateable Vinyl Flag Sticker
listings.body: Top Quality 5MM- PVC Board. Upgrade your collection with the ultimate tournament centerpiece. This is an ultra-premium, commercial-grade 2026 World Cup Bracket Tracker engineered specifically for the historic 1 Continent - 48 Nations tournament format. This is not a cheap paper poster that wrinkles or tears—it is a heavy-duty, multi-layered structural display designed to look flawless from the opening match to the final trophy lift. Built for and actively installed in high-end Manhattan bars, this elite showcase is now available for serious collectors and premium home setups. Elite 3-Layer Architectural Construction: Industrial 5mm PVC Core: Heavy-duty, rigid backing that maintains a perfectly flat profile and will never warp, crease, or roll up. High-Definition Print Grid: Vibrant, high-contrast graphics featuring pristine legibility for all 48 national team slots. Cold Gloss Laminate Shield: Premium protective coating that guards against scratches, UV fading, and smudges while delivering a deep luxury shine. Interactive Low-Tack Tracker System: Updatable National Flag Stickers: Includes a complete set of precision-cut vinyl flag stickers to advance teams through the group stages and knockout rounds. 100% Removable & Repositionable: Specialized low-tack vinyl allows you to easily apply, peel, and reposition the flags cleanly without leaving a single trace of sticky residue on the premium gloss finish. Product Specifications: Format: Official 2026 48-Nation Tournament Structure. Condition: Brand New, retail-quality manufacturing. Mounting: Extremely lightweight despite its rigid structure; mounts effortlessly to walls using standard command strips or double-sided tape. Price: [$50] Pickup: [Harstdale] Serious inquiries only. If this ad is up, the item is available. Message to secure yours before kickoff!
